foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Understanding normal body fluid compartments, osmolality regulation and renal handling of electrolytes is the physiological foundation for fluid therapy

foundations.subject: surgery
foundations.reason: Preoperative fluid status assessment and correction of electrolyte imbalances is essential before any surgical procedure

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Hypovolemic shock results from uncorrected fluid deficits; rational fluid resuscitation requires understanding of crystalloid vs colloid physiology

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Major burns cause massive third-space fluid losses requiring formula-based IV fluid resuscitation (Parkland formula) and electrolyte monitoring

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Parenteral nutrition requires careful electrolyte supplementation; refeeding syndrome causes dangerous hypophosphatemia and hypokalemia

clinical.subject: surgery
clinical.reason: Perioperative fluid management (maintenance, replacement, deficit correction) is a core daily surgical skill

objectives: SU12.2: Describe and discuss the methods of estimation and replacement of
integration: This undergraduate-level roadmap connects Fluid & Electrolyte Balance across foundational sciences and clinical applications.
